title: Prevent Despawn
description: Simpler server side mod that makes applying a tag to items prevent despawning when loose in the world
body:
![Protect Rare and Valuables from Despawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MWa7nFsr/images/7e6f5d8042e1d42892e30417f1657977c9a03c42.png)

This is a simple server side mod that prevents the despawning of items that are added to a new tag, aptly named  "prevent_despawn".

Currently this only supports ItemEntities.

By default this tag contains

```
    "minecraft:dragon_egg",
    "minecraft:nether_star",
    "minecraft:totem_of_undying"
 ```
